ClaroSec Book a Consultation
Cybersecurity & AI Consulting

Cybersecurity and AI leadership for growing businesses — without the enterprise price tag.

ClaroSec helps small and mid-sized businesses protect what matters and put AI to work — led by a professional with over a decade in telecom infrastructure and hands-on AI implementation experience.

Book a Free Consultation No pitch. No pressure. Just an honest assessment.
The challenge

Two questions.
One partner.

Every business owner is hearing the same two things right now: "You're going to get hacked" and "AI is going to leave you behind." Both feel urgent. Neither feels clear. And the vendors lining up to help are either selling you enterprise software you'll never use, or pitching AI magic without understanding your actual business.

Meanwhile, your team is already using AI tools you haven't approved. Customer data is going into ChatGPT. Phishing emails are getting smarter. Compliance requirements are multiplying. And you're not sure which problem to solve first.

You don't need two vendors who don't talk to each other. You need one partner who understands both — and can tell you exactly what to prioritize.

Services

What we do

Security and AI aren't separate problems. We treat them as one.

Security Services
01

Security Posture Assessment

A thorough review of your network, systems, and vulnerabilities — delivered as a clear, prioritized report with actionable recommendations. Not a 200-page document that collects dust. A roadmap you can actually follow.

02

Virtual CISO

Ongoing cybersecurity leadership on a retainer — strategic guidance, policy development, vendor assessments, and incident support. The expertise of a Chief Information Security Officer at a fraction of the cost of a full-time hire.

03

Compliance Gap Analysis

Where do you stand against frameworks like NIST, CIS Controls, or industry-specific requirements? We assess your current state, identify the gaps, and build a remediation plan that makes sense for your size and budget.

AI Services
04

AI Readiness Assessment

Your team is already using AI — the question is whether it's helping or creating risk. We evaluate your current AI usage, identify high-value opportunities for automation, and deliver a practical roadmap for adoption that fits your business.

05

Workflow Automation

We build AI-powered workflows that save real time — document processing, customer routing, reporting, data entry. Using proven platforms like n8n, Zapier, and Claude, not custom software that breaks when we leave.

06

AI Governance & Policy

Clear policies for how your team uses AI tools, what data goes where, and how to evaluate new vendors. The guardrails that let you move fast without creating liability.

Where Security Meets AI
07

AI Security Review

A combined assessment that audits how your business uses AI through both a security and implementation lens. We find the shadow AI, close the data leakage, and replace risky workarounds with governed workflows that actually work better.

Our approach

Why work with us

10+

Years protecting critical telecom infrastructure — and building with AI tools every day.

ClaroSec was founded by a professional with over a decade of experience protecting critical telecom infrastructure — and a practitioner who builds with AI tools every day.

That combination is rare. Most security consultants don't understand AI implementation. Most AI consultants don't think about security. We do both, because in 2026 you can't do one without the other — every AI deployment creates security questions, and every security engagement now uncovers ungoverned AI usage.

We work exclusively with small and mid-sized businesses because we believe every company deserves serious guidance — not just the ones with enterprise budgets. We explain things in plain English, we prioritize what actually reduces your risk, and we don't sell you things you don't need.

Who we work with

Industries we serve

  • Telecom providers and resellers
  • Managed service providers
  • Healthcare practices
  • Legal and professional services firms
  • Any growing business ready to get serious about security and AI

Let's start with a conversation.

Book a free 30-minute consultation. We'll talk about where your business stands today — on security, AI, or both — and whether ClaroSec is the right fit. No pitch, no pressure — just an honest assessment of your situation.

Schedule Your Free Consultation
